Registry / Terms / electronic measuring instrument

electronic measuring instrument

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02215 · 6 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 5 distinct definitions — harmonise.
